title: Inspiration, Surprises and Winners at the 2023 Fall My-Cache Scholars Banquet
summary: The Bering Strait Higher Education My-Cache (MyCache) group once again put on a meaningful event for the scholars just post-midterms at UAA in Anchorage. Not only did scholars receive a very delicious and filling meal, but it filled their cup in a way food and water never would.
